lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Hello old bean. Is there something I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: My name is Tarquin Marjoribanks.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: I'd be surprised if you haven't already heard of me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would I have heard of you Mr. Marjoribanks?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: It's pronounced 'Marchbanks'!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: You should know of me because I am a member of the royal family of Misthalin!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you related to King Roald?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Oh yes! Quite closely actually.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: I'm his 4th cousin, once removed on his mothers side.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Okay. What are you doing here then?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: I'm canoeing on the river! It's enormous fun! Would you like to know how?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you teach me about canoes?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Well, you don't look like you have the skill to make a canoe.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: You need to have at least level 12 woodcutting.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Once you are able to make a canoe it makes travel along the river much quicker!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: It's really quite simple. Just walk down to that tree on the bank and chop it down.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: When you have done that you can shape the log further with your axe to make a canoe.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: My personal favourite is the Stable Dugout canoe. A finer craft you'll never see old bean!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: A Stable Dugout canoe will take you pretty much the length of the Lum river.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Of course there are other canoes.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Further up river, near the Barbarian Village, I saw some darned fool 'canoeing' on a log!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Unfortunately, you don't have the skill to create anything more than one of those logs. I dare say it will only get 1 stop down the river!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Still, I'm sure it will satisfy one such as yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that supposed to mean?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Do not profane the royal house of Varrock by engaging me in further discourse you knave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Pfft! I doubt he even knows the King!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: You seem to be quite handy with an axe though!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: I'm sure you can build a Dugout canoe. Not as fine as a Stable Dugout but it will carry you 2 stops on the river.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: I should imagine it would suit your limited means.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean when you say 'limited means'?

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Well, you're just an itinerant adventurer!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: What possible reason would you have for cluttering up my river with your inferior water craft!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Ah! Perfect! You can make a Stable Dugout canoe! One of those will carry you to any civilised place on the river.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: If you were of good pedigree I'd let you join my boat club. You seem to be one of those vagabond adventurers though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Charming!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Be off with you rogue!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: Well ... erm. You seem to be able to make a Waka!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds fun, what's a Waka.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: I've only ever seen one man on the river who uses a Waka. A big, fearsome looking fellow up near Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: People say he was born in the Wilderness and that he is looking for a route back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that true!

lines.speaker: Tarquin
lines.text: How should I know? I would not consort with such a base fellow!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, not right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me about canoes?
